_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.fail2ban_status: active - sshd jail running, 8 currently banned, 5495 total banned
ssh_attacks.change_since_last: fail2ban total bans 5495 (up from 5445, +50). 8 IPs currently banned (up from 3). 9 currently failed. Brute-force continues at typical rate. Only authorized activity from novakj.

pdf_security.document_write_safe: 1 usage in keyboard-shortcuts.js line 395 — writes to newly opened blank window for print cheat sheet only. All content escaped via escapeHtml(). Acceptable pattern.
pdf_security.innerHTML_note: 128 usages across 37 JS files — all safe: static templates, clearing operations, escaped user data, numeric-only interpolation, blob URLs, hardcoded SVG, or escapeHtml()/escHtml() helper. headers-footers.js has 0 innerHTML uses.

headers_footers_js.feature: TASK-050: Headers & Footers tool. Add recurring headers, footers, and page numbers to every page or a page range. 6 placement zones (top/bottom x left/center/right). Token substitution ({page}, {pages}, {date}, {filename}, {title}). Multiple number styles (arabic, roman, alpha). Font/size/color/opacity/bold/italic customization. Separator lines. Odd/even page alternation. 5 built-in presets + custom presets via localStorage. Live preview on canvas. Remove existing headers/footers.
headers_footers_js.input_handling: Zone text rendered via canvas ctx.fillText() and pdf-lib page.drawText() — neither interprets HTML. Custom preset names from prompt() displayed via opt.textContent (DOM API) and showToast (uses textContent). Numeric inputs clamped via bindNumberInput(). Colors validated via hexToRgbNorm() regex. Page ranges parsed via parseInt with bounds checking.
headers_footers_js.resource_protection: Preview renders single page at 0.6x scale. Processing iterates target pages sequentially. Text truncation prevents excessive text width. No web worker but consistent with other modules.
headers_footers_js.custom_presets_storage: localStorage key 'hf-custom-presets'. JSON object of {name: {zones, settings}}. No sensitive data. Preset names not length-limited (minor — only affects localStorage size).
headers_footers_js.download_safety: Uses downloadBlob() from utils.js which sanitizes filenames.

task_034_review.change: viewer.js: Added bus.on('navigate:page', (pageNum) => goToPage(pageNum)) to wire internal hyperlink navigation
task_034_review.detail: pageNum is always a numeric value from hyperlinks.js link.targetPage (parsed from PDF annotation destination). goToPage() already validates page bounds. No user-controlled strings involved.

known_issues: server_tokens set to 'build' - leaks nginx version (nginx/1.26.3 Ubuntu) in Server header. Should be 'off'.
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. Any new .md file added to webroot would be publicly accessible.
UFW firewall is inactive - only SSH and HTTP/HTTPS ports are needed but no firewall enforces this.
disable_symlinks off in nginx config - low risk since only novakj can write to webroot.
CGI location block exists in nginx but no CGI scripts present - dead config that could be removed.
Codex proxy at /codex returns 502 - backend not running. No security risk but dead endpoint.

merge.js, batch.js, hyperlinks.js, bates.js, command-palette.js, keyboard-shortcuts.js use escapeHtml() that does not escape double quotes. CSP script-src 'self' mitigates inline handler injection. In most files used in element content (safe). In attribute contexts (title/aria-label) should add escapeAttr().

hyperlinks.js: detected PDF link URLs not validated for protocol scheme. A malicious PDF could contain javascript: URIs in link annotations. CSP + noopener/noreferrer mitigate. Should add protocol allowlist (http/https/mailto) before window.open().
hyperlinks.js line 686: email link window.open() missing noopener/noreferrer — minor since mailto: links are low risk.
img2pdf.js image validation uses OR logic (MIME type OR extension) - slightly permissive but acceptable for client-side processing.
insert-pages.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
metadata.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
batch.js line 294: escapeHtml() used with textContent causes double-escaping — cosmetic display bug for filenames containing &, <, >.
keyboard-shortcuts.js line 395: document.write used on new popup window for print cheat sheet — acceptable pattern but noted for tracking.
headers-footers.js: custom preset names from prompt() not length-limited before localStorage storage — minor, only affects local storage size.
notes: Security review completed — 87 checks passed, 0 fixes needed this run.

NEW: Reviewed headers-footers.js (851 lines, TASK-050). Clean module — zero innerHTML, zero eval, zero document.write. All user text rendered via canvas API and pdf-lib (not HTML). Custom presets stored safely in localStorage.
TASK-034 viewer.js change reviewed: navigate:page bus event wired to goToPage(). Numeric-only, bounds-checked. Secure.
JS file count: 50 (up from 49 — 1 new file headers-footers.js).
innerHTML count: 128 across 37 files (unchanged — new file has 0 innerHTML uses).
SSH: fail2ban total bans 5495 (+50 since last review). 8 IPs currently banned (up from 3). 9 currently failed attempts. Only authorized activity from novakj.
SSL certificate valid until June 18, 2026 (76 days remaining).
All security headers confirmed in HTTP response. Nginx blocking rules verified.
recommendations: MEDIUM-LOW: Add protocol allowlist to hyperlinks.js handleLinkClick() — only allow http:, https:, mailto: schemes before calling window.open() on detected PDF links
LOW: Add escapeAttr() function to merge.js, batch.js, hyperlinks.js, bates.js, command-palette.js, keyboard-shortcuts.js for attribute contexts instead of escapeHtml()
LOW: Fix batch.js line 294 — use fileName directly with textContent instead of escapeHtml(fileName)
LOW: Set server_tokens off in nginx.conf to stop leaking version info (currently exposes nginx/1.26.3)
LOW: Enable UFW firewall (sudo ufw allow 22,80,443/tcp && sudo ufw enable)
LOW: Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for known safe files
LOW: Remove dead escapeHtml() function from insert-pages.js and metadata.js
LOW: Remove unused CGI location block from nginx config
LOW: Consider disable_symlinks on in nginx for defense in depth
LOW: Add length limit to custom preset names in headers-footers.js saveCustomPreset()
